MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT MARK ROBINSON Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf Matthew Arena'S Attendance At A Deposition And Responses To Def'S Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jeanette Little, Esq. of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, (925-225-6884) for Mark Pierre Robinson, Defendant and moving party through Court Call.
No other appearance on the matter.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT MARK ROBINSON's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Matthew Arena'S Attendance At A Deposition And Responses To Defendant'S Discovery Requests is Granted; Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted. Sanctions in the amount of $520.00 awarded. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported.=(302/JPT)
